title: veronica teucrium subsp. thracica
intro: Veronica teucrium subsp. thracica, also known as Thrace Veronica or Thrace Teucrium, is a plant species in the family Plantaginaceae and is a subspecies of the Teucrium genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive issues. The herbal preparation of Veronica teucrium subsp. thracica typically involves drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
